motivational.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivational.author: Steve Jobs

motivational.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivational.author: Theodore Roosevelt

technology.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
technology.author: Arthur C. Clarke

technology.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
technology.author: Linus Torvalds

history.text: Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it.
history.author: George Santayana

history.text: History is written by the victors.
history.author: Winston Churchill

science.text: Equipped with his five senses, man explores the universe around him and calls the adventure Science.
science.author: Edwin Powell Hubble

science.text: Science is a way of thinking much more than it is a body of knowledge.
science.author: Carl Sagan

education.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
education.author: Nelson Mandela
education.source: Speech at Madison Park High School, 1990

education.text: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
education.author: Plutarch
